query:
SELECT
            cd.prominent_colors[1] as "source_color!",
            mi.id as "media_id!"
        FROM color AS cd
        JOIN visual_analysis AS va ON cd.visual_analysis_id = va.id
        JOIN media_item AS mi ON va.media_item_id = mi.id
        WHERE mi.user_id = $1
          AND mi.deleted = false
          AND cardinality(cd.prominent_colors) > 0
        ORDER BY mi.id
        LIMIT 1
        OFFSET $2
